fewShots.question: top 5 campaigns by revenue
fewShots.query:
EVALUATE
  TOPN(
    5,
    ADDCOLUMNS(
      SUMMARIZE(
        'orders',
        'marketing_campaigns'[campaign_name]
      ),
      "Revenue", [Attributed Revenue]
    ),
    [Revenue], DESC
  )
ORDER BY [Revenue] DESC

fewShots.question: which customer segments have the highest churn risk
fewShots.query:
EVALUATE
  TOPN(
    10,
    ADDCOLUMNS(
      VALUES('crm_segments'[segment_name]),
      "Average Churn Risk", CALCULATE([Avg Churn Risk]),
      "Customer Count", CALCULATE(DISTINCTCOUNT('crm_customers'[customer_id]))
    ),
    [Average Churn Risk], DESC
  )
ORDER BY [Average Churn Risk] DESC
